ocr_findings.jp_actual: Final output ア=「日曜日のフルバックアップファイル」 ; answer_index=0 (i.e. correct=ア). But the printed answer key on page 445 (cleaned.md line 64) says 「問題12-4 ア」 where 「ア」 corresponds to raw OCR ア = 「日曜日のフルバックアップファイル、月曜日と火曜日の増分バックアップファイル」.
ocr_findings.jp_expected: ア = 「日曜日のフルバックアップファイル、月曜日と火曜日の増分バックアップファイル」 (raw OCR line 13). The current output ア = Sunday-full-only is technically incorrect for restoring to Tuesday end-of-day under incremental backup semantics, and the marked answer_index=0 thus selects an incorrect choice.
ocr_findings.trace: raw OCR (ocr/page_445.md lines 13-16) has order ア/イ/ウ/エ = [Sun+Mon+Tue inc, Sun+Tue inc, Mon+Tue inc, Tue inc]. cleaned/page_445.md lines 11-14 has order ア/イ/ウ/エ = [Sun only, Sun+Tue inc, Sun+Mon+Tue inc, Tue inc]. Cleaned stage reordered the choices, but answer_index=0 was carried through translated→output as ア=Sun-only with the correct-answer flag still on index 0. Result: published answer is mathematically wrong.
ocr_findings.recommended_fix: Either (a) restore raw-OCR choice ordering (ア = Sun+Mon+Tue inc) and keep answer_index=0, or (b) keep cleaned ordering and set answer_index=2 (ウ = Sun+Mon+Tue inc). Option (b) matches the cleaned canonical text and the printed answer-key letter 「ア」 if you renumber the answer key accordingly. Safer: align cleaned choice order back to raw OCR (option a) to preserve the printed 「ア」 letter.

translation_findings.issue: translated/page_445.json question p445::1 choices[2] and choices[3] still leak ウ./エ. into zh and en fields (FW dot included). Choice-marker normalization missed indices 2-3.
translation_findings.recommended_fix: Output stage has fully normalized to A/B/C/D, so release artifact is OK. But the translated/ intermediate is stale — re-run R9-C normalization fix on translated/ if intermediates are released, or document that output/ is the canonical surface.

translation_findings.jp: ア／イ／ウ／エ choices for cell formula
translation_findings.zh: (translated.json) ア／イ／ウ／エ leak in all 4 zh choices
translation_findings.en: (translated.json) ア／イ／ウ／エ leak in all 4 en choices
translation_findings.issue: translated/page_445.json question p445::2 all 4 choices retain ア./イ./ウ./エ. prefixes in zh and en. Output stage is normalized, but translated/ intermediate is not.
translation_findings.recommended_fix: Same as above — only output/ is canonical. If translated/ is in release scope, re-normalize.

translation_findings.jp: セルD2とE2に設定した2種類の表の消費税率で... セルD4にE2による式計算式を求め、セルD4にE2の人金する式計算式は、セルD5、E4及びE5に複製して使うものとする。
translation_findings.zh: 使用在单元格D2和E2中设定的两种消费税率... 在单元格D4中输入基于E2的计算式，该输入到单元格D4的计算式将被复制到单元格D5、E4和E5中使用。
translation_findings.en: Using the two consumption tax rates set in cells D2 and E2... Determine the formula based on E2 to be entered in cell D4...
translation_findings.issue: Source JP stem (output stem.jp) is itself garbled: '2種類の表の消費税率' should be '2種類の仮の消費税率' (raw OCR line 42 has 「2種類の仮の消費税率」); 'セルD4にE2による式計算式を求め' / 'セルD4にE2の人金する式計算式' are corrupted (raw OCR line 42 reads simply 「セルD4に入れるべき計算式はどれか。ここで、セルD4に入力する計算式は、セルD5、E4及びE5に複写して使うものとする。」). The cleaned stage corrupted the stem AND the question lost its leading 'どれか' question form. ZH/EN faithfully translate the garbled JP, propagating the corruption downstream. Stem is unreadable and the choice-set is meaningless without the original prompt; this affects the published artifact.
translation_findings.recommended_fix: Reset stem to the raw-OCR JP: 「セルD2とE2に設定した2種類の仮の消費税率でセルA4とA5の商品の税込み価格を計算するために、セルD4に入れるべき計算式はどれか。ここで、セルD4に入力する計算式は、セルD5、E4及びE5に複写して使うものとする。（平成22年度）」 then re-translate zh/en.

translation_findings.issue: raw OCR (ocr/page_445.md line 11) says 「平成28年度」 (FY 2016, no season). Cleaned/translated/output all show 「平成28年春」 (Spring 2016). The same year-drift appears on questions p445::1 (raw: 平成28年度 → output: 平成29年春) — that one mutates the exam YEAR as well. Question p445::1 raw OCR line 22 = 「平成28年度」 but translated/output stem says 「平成29年春」. This is a factual metadata error affecting citeability.
translation_findings.recommended_fix: Restore raw-OCR exam-year metadata: p445::0 = 平成28年度 (or confirm season independently before adding 春). p445::1 = 平成28年度 (NOT 平成29年春). p445::2 = 平成22年度 (raw OCR line 44). Update zh/en accordingly: '(FY 2016)' etc.
